allow: Bash(curl:*)
Bash(git *)
Bash(npm run build*)
Bash(node *)
Bash(lsof *)
Bash(kill *)
Bash(nohup *)
Bash(bash /Users/caijunchang/openclaw任務面版設計/scripts/*)
Bash(# 看 NEUXA 最近有沒有工具呼叫（bash/read/write等） grep -a ""tool_call\\|bash\\|read\\|write\\|runId\\|agent.*start\\|agent.*end"" /tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-02-27.log)
Bash(# 看最後一次 NEUXA 有活動是什麼時候 grep -a ""sendMessage ok\\|runId\\|thinking\\|draining"" ~/.openclaw/logs/gateway.log)
Bash(# 找 sessions_spawn 的錯誤訊息原文 grep -a ""sessions_spawn\\|agentId is not allowed\\|spawn\\|subagent"" ~/.openclaw/logs/gateway.log)
Bash(# 看 openclaw 版本，看是否有 sessions_spawn 功能文件 openclaw --version && openclaw help)
Read(//Users/caijunchang/openclaw任務面版設計/**)
Bash(# Check the FULL timeline - incoming message to outgoing reply tail -200 /tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-02-27.log)
Bash(# Look at the FULL flow including delivery tail -500 /tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-02-27.log)

Bash(# Check if there''s already a proxy/mirror for Telegram in the config grep -rn ""telegram\\|proxy\\|HTTPS_PROXY\\|HTTP_PROXY"" /Users/caijunchang/.openclaw/config.json /Users/caijunchang/.openclaw/openclaw.json)
Bash(# Check if openclaw gateway supports Telegram API base URL override strings /opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/*.js)
Bash(# Search for proxy configuration for telegram strings /opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/*.js)
Read(//private/etc/**)
Bash(sudo tee -a /etc/hosts)
Bash(# 看小蔡工作目錄最近有沒有新檔案 ls -lt /Users/caijunchang/Downloads/openclaw-console-hub-main/)

Bash(# 找今天 15:00 之後修改的文件（NEUXA workspace） find /Users/caijunchang/.openclaw/workspace/ -maxdepth 1 -type f -newer /Users/caijunchang/.openclaw/workspace/WAKE_STATUS.md -o -name ""*.md"" -newer /tmp/openclaw-server.log)
Bash(# 看 gateway 主 log ls -lt /Users/caijunchang/.openclaw/logs/)
Bash(# 從進程歷史找啟動路徑 grep -r ""openclaw-gateway"" /Users/caijunchang/Library/LaunchAgents/)
Bash(# 看 NEUXA 的 sessions（最近活動） ls -lt /Users/caijunchang/.openclaw/workspace/memory/)

Bash(# 找 n8n 相關 find /Users/caijunchang/openclaw任務面版設計/docs -name ""*n8n*"" -o -name ""*N8N*"" -o -name ""*workflow*"" && echo ""=== supabase ==="" && find /Users/caijunchang/openclaw任務面版設計/docs -name ""*supabase*"" -o -name ""*Supabase*"" -o -name ""*database*"" && echo ""=== server .env ==="" && grep ""SUPABASE\\|N8N\\|NEXT_PUBLIC"" /Users/caijunchang/openclaw任務面版設計/server/.env)
Bash(launchctl stop com.openclaw.taskboard)
Bash(launchctl start com.openclaw.taskboard)
Bash(sort -t/ -k7)
